{"steps": [{"title": "Photosynthesis Intro", "image_show_confidencescore": 0.85, "image_description": "1ppr peridinin chlorophyll protein.png", "lang": "hi-IN", "frames": [{"frame_type": "concept", "text": "Photosynthesis: Plants ka apna khana banane ka process. 
Uses: **Sunlight**, **Water**, **Carbon Dioxide**", "highlight": ["Sunlight", "Water", "Carbon Dioxide"], "speech": "Namaste students! Aaj hum ek bahut hi mazedaar process ke bare mein seekhenge jise kehte hain photosynthesis. Yeh woh tarika hai jisse plants apna khana khud banate hain, bilkul ek chef ki tarah!", "tts_engine": "android", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 4000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}, {"frame_type": "concept", "text": "Photosynthesis ka basic formula: 
**Sunlight** + **Water** + **Carbon Dioxide** -> **Sugar** (food) + **Oxygen**", "highlight": ["Sunlight", "Water", "Carbon Dioxide", "Sugar", "Oxygen"], "speech": "Is process mein, plants **sunlight** se energy lete hain, roots se **paani** (water) aur hawa se **carbon dioxide** lete hain. In sabko milakar woh apne liye sugar banate hain, jo unka khana hai, aur saath hi **oxygen** release karte hain.", "tts_engine": "google", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 4500, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}]}, {"title": "Role of Sunlight", "image_show_confidencescore": 0.7, "lang": "hi-IN", "frames": [{"frame_type": "concept", "text": "**Sunlight**: Energy source for photosynthesis. 
Chlorophyll captures light energy.", "highlight": ["Sunlight"], "speech": "Socho, agar sunlight na ho toh kya plants apna khana bana payenge? Bilkul nahi! **Sunlight** plants ke liye sabse important energy source hai. Leaves mein ek green pigment hota hai jise chlorophyll kehte hain, woh is light ko pakadta hai.", "tts_engine": "google", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 4000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}, {"frame_type": "concept", "text": "Sunlight is converted to chemical energy. 
This powers the creation of sugar.", "highlight": ["chemical energy", "sugar"], "speech": "Sunlight ki energy ko plants **chemical energy** mein badal dete hain. Yahi energy unko sugar, yaani apna khana, banane mein madad karti hai.", "tts_engine": "google", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 3500, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}]}, {"title": "Water and CO2", "image_show_confidencescore": 0.8, "image_description": "Fpls-02-00028-g012.png", "lang": "hi-IN", "frames": [{"frame_type": "concept", "text": "**Water** absorption by roots. 
**Carbon Dioxide** intake through stomata (pores in leaves).", "highlight": ["Water", "Carbon Dioxide"], "speech": "Ab baat karte hain **paani** aur **carbon dioxide** ki. Plants apni roots se zameen se **paani** (water) lete hain. Aur hawa mein jo **carbon dioxide** hai, woh woh leaves par chhote chhote pores hote hain, jinko stomata kehte hain, unse andar lete hain.", "tts_engine": "google", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 4500, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}, {"frame_type": "concept", "text": "These are the raw materials for making food.", "highlight": ["raw materials"], "speech": "Toh yeh **paani** aur **carbon dioxide** asli mein plants ke liye raw materials ki tarah kaam karte hain, jinse woh apna khana banate hain.", "tts_engine": "google", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 3000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}]}, {"title": "Oxygen Release", "image_show_confidencescore": 0.75, "lang": "hi-IN", "frames": [{"frame_type": "concept", "text": "**Oxygen**: A byproduct of photosynthesis. 
Essential for all living beings.", "highlight": ["Oxygen"], "speech": "Aur sabse achhi baat yeh hai ki photosynthesis ke process mein **oxygen** release hoti hai! Yeh **oxygen** hum sabhi jeev-jantuo ke liye saans lene ke liye bahut zaroori hai.", "tts_engine": "google", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 4000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}, {"frame_type": "concept", "text": "Plants give us the air we breathe!", "highlight": ["air we breathe"], "speech": "Iska matlab hai ki plants humare liye woh hawa banate hain jisse hum saans lete hain. Kitna amazing hai na?", "tts_engine": "google", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 3500, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}]}, {"title": "Quiz & Recap", "image_show_confidencescore": 0.0, "image_description": null, "lang": "hi-IN", "frames": [{"frame_type": "quiz_mcq", "text": "Photosynthesis mein plants kis cheez se energy lete hain?", "highlight": [], "speech": "Chaliye ab dekhte hain ki aapne kitna seekha! Sawal hai: Photosynthesis mein plants kis cheez se energy lete hain?", "tts_engine": "android", "voice_role": "quiz", "duration_ms": 3000, "quiz_answer": "Sunlight", "quiz_options": ["Paani", "Carbon Dioxide", "Sunlight", "Oxygen"], "quiz_correct_index": 2, "quiz_model_answer": "Sunlight", "quiz_keywords": ["Sunlight", "energy"], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}, {"frame_type": "summary", "text": "- Photosynthesis: Plants make their own food.
- Inputs: Sunlight, Water, Carbon Dioxide.
- Outputs: Sugar (food), Oxygen.
- Oxygen is vital for us!", "highlight": [], "speech": "Toh aaj humne seekha ki photosynthesis kya hai, iske liye kya chahiye, aur yeh hamare liye kitna zaroori hai. Plants sunlight, paani aur carbon dioxide use karke apna khana banate hain aur humare liye oxygen release karte hain. Bahut khoob!", "tts_engine": "google", "voice_role": "teacher", "duration_ms": 4000, "quiz_answer": "", "quiz_options": [], "quiz_correct_index": -1, "quiz_model_answer": "", "quiz_keywords": [], "fill_blanks": [], "quiz_correct_order": []}]}]}
